name: ag-notify
description: Plays simple sound notifications when the Google Antigravity Agent finishes a task.

agNotify.soundOnComplete.description: Play a sound when the agent completes its final response.

agNotify.soundOnCompleteType.description: WAV file name of built-in premium sounds (minimal_chime.wav, success_bell.wav, agent_done.wav) or absolute path to a custom WAV file.

agNotify.enabled.description: Global toggle to enable or disable all sound notifications.

agNotify.premiumLicenseKey.description: Patreon/Lemon Squeezy Premium License Key (AGN-XXXX-XXXX) to unlock premium features and remove ads.

commands.title: AG Notify: Enter Premium License Key
